data: {"generalSituation":"The easterly airstream affecting the coast of Guangdong will be replaced by a southerly airstream tomorrow. Meanwhile, with the anticyclone aloft strengthening, the weather will improve over the region. It will be hot during the day in the next couple of days. The anticyclone aloft is expected to cover the northern part of the South China Sea early to midweek next week, and bring hot weather to the coast of southern China persistently.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260409","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"South to southeast force 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
